key_evidence: Teamsters won first-ever NLRB bargaining order against Amazon — historic structural ACC positive on labor governance
NLRB Region 29 obtained federal court cease-and-desist order requiring Amazon to stop firing employees for protected union activities — formal legal instrument
APWU filed formal NLRB charges against Bellingham facility (DCB8) for unlawful discipline and coercive tactics

Concurrent enforcement actions confirm systemic multi-facility pattern (Bellingham, JFK8, and others), but Teamsters bargaining order is a positive accountability-architecture event that partially offsets accumulation pressure
Per second-event-at-floor convention (Turkey v1.3): no second apply within 24-hour window of May 23 -5.0 apply; document as positive counter-signal reducing next-cycle accumulation pressure
triage_note: Triage 2026-07-21: older duplicate; newest in group is 2026-05-25. Not applied; current published score is authoritative.
